declarations.description: Compact search and filter web component with normal filters, optional extra filters, selected filter chips, and search event.
declarations.name: JBSearchbarWebComponent

attributes.name: search-on-change
attributes.description: Runs search() after selected extra filters change. Empty attribute and true mean true.

members.name: value
members.description: Current normal filter values plus selected extra filters.

members.name: filterList
members.description: Selected extra-filter chips. This is runtime state, not the available filter template list.

members.name: searchOnChange
members.description: Runs search() after selected extra filters change.

members.name: isLoading
members.description: Plays or stops the search icon loading animation.

methods.name: deleteFilter
methods.description: Removes a selected extra filter by index and dispatches change.

methods.name: createFilterList
methods.description: Creates the proxied selected-filter list used internally.

events.name: search
events.description: Dispatched when the search button is clicked or search() is called.

events.name: change
events.description: Dispatched when a selected extra filter is added or removed.

slots.name: divider
slots.description: Optional divider content between normal filters and extra filters.

cssParts.name: dynamic-wrapper
cssParts.description: Wrapper around normal filters, selected extra filters, divider, and extra filter slot.

declarations.description: Optional filter selector for jb-searchbar. It turns slotted form elements into selectable extra filter templates.
declarations.name: JBExtraFilterWebComponent

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Visual size forwarded to the internal select.

attributes.name: autofocus
attributes.description: Focuses the internal select after it initializes when set as an empty attribute.

members.name: intentColumn
members.description: Current selected filter draft before it is submitted.

members.name: extractDisplayValue
members.description: Converts a filter value to the display string shown in the selected filter chip.

methods.name: updateSlotElements
methods.description: Re-reads slotted filter templates and updates the select options.

methods.name: setFilterListSelectOptionList
methods.description: Updates the available option list after selected filters change.

events.name: load
events.description: Dispatched from connectedCallback before parent lookup.

events.name: init
events.description: Dispatched from connectedCallback after parent lookup.

events.name: intent-submit
events.description: Dispatched when the user submits an extra filter value. detail contains name, label, displayValue, and value.

slots.description: Filter template elements that have name and value properties.

cssParts.name: intent-wrapper
cssParts.description: Wrapper shown while the user fills a selected filter value.

cssParts.name: intent-input-wrapper
cssParts.description: Wrapper where the selected filter input is moved.

cssParts.name: intent-submit-button
cssParts.description: Button that submits the selected extra filter value.
